Test Description: Verifies DMA controller register defaults and masked write/read behavior across the full register map defined in test_define.c. Sequence: check reset values against default_value_array; for six data patterns, write to writable registers, then read and compare masked expected values; accumulate failures and report overall pass/fail via finish().
Remarks: Registers are enumerated via addr_array[] from test_define.c; addresses with read_mask_array[i]==0 or write_mask_array[i]==0 are conditionally skipped; additional per-address skipping via skip_array[]; soft_reset_chk() exists but is not invoked in test_case().
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry point: test_case()
1) Call chk_rst_val().
   1.1) For i = 0..(CNT-1): addr = addr_array[i]. If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE (skip read).
   1.2) READ data_rd = read_reg(addr_array[i]). [Operation: READ]
   1.3) IF (data_rd == default_value_array[i]) then PASS for this address; ELSE def_fail_cnt++ and printf failure with addr, expected, read.
2) Optional debug printf blocks (conditional on DEBUG_DISPLAY).
3) Call chk_rd_wr().
   3.1) Define chk_val[6] = {0xffffffff, 0xaaaaaaaa, 0x55555555, 0x00000000, 0xA5A5A5A5, 0xffff0000}.
   3.2) For j = 0..5: data_wr = chk_val[j].
       3.2.1) Write phase: For i = 0..(CNT-1): addr = addr_array[i]. If skip_array[i] == 1: CONTINUE. If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE. ELSE WRITE write_reg(addr, data_wr). [Operation: WRITE]
       3.2.2) Read/verify phase: For i = 0..(CNT-1): addr = addr_array[i]. If skip_array[i] == 1: CONTINUE. If write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE. If read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE. ELSE:
              a) READ data_rd = read_reg(addr). [Operation: READ]
              b) Compute wr_n = (write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff).
              c) Compute exp_val = ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])).
              d) IF (data_rd == exp_val) PASS for this address; ELSE wr_fail_cnt++ and printf mismatch with addr, expected, read.
4) After chk_rd_wr(): In test_case(), IF (def_fail_cnt > 0 || wr_fail_cnt > 0) then finish(1) ELSE finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
Default value check: For each i where read_mask_array[i] != 0, PASS if (read_reg(addr_array[i]) == default_value_array[i]); else increment def_fail_cnt and print failure.
Masked write/read check: For each pattern data_wr in {0xffffffff,0xaaaaaaaa,0x55555555,0x00000000,0xA5A5A5A5,0xffff0000}, and for each i where skip_array[i]==0, write_mask_array[i] != 0, and read_mask_array[i] != 0: after WRITE write_reg(addr_array[i], data_wr), PASS if (read_reg(addr_array[i]) == ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i]))); else increment wr_fail_cnt and print mismatch.
Final test result: PASS if (def_fail_cnt == 0 && wr_fail_cnt == 0) leading to finish(0); FAIL if (def_fail_cnt > 0 || wr_fail_cnt > 0) leading to finish(1).
